results.title: Why Did Paresh Rawal Claim OMG 2 Was His Idea All Along
results.description: Paresh Rawal recently stated that the core concept of OMG 2 was originally his idea. We analyze the evolution of the Bollywood script, the casting shift, and why idea ownership in cinema is complex.

results.title: "I would fight it tooth and nail": The Sims artist would challenge any mandate to reduce diversity after EA Saudi buyout
results.description: Answering concerns that The Sims team may face pressure to reduce support for diversity following the Saudi Arabian-backed buyout of EA, senior character artist Jess Hyland says she's not "heard anything" about such a mandate and, if one were introduced, she "would fight it tooth and nail." Read more
